risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear datum.
risk.mit: Implement clear primary datum feature and assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Potential for damage during handling due to lack of strain relief on cables.
risk.mit: Add strain relief geometry to all cable exits.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying or labeling.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming educational model as functional component.
risk.mit: Clearly label all non-functional components.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly issues due to missing interface fit classes.
risk.mit: Define fit classes for all interfaces.

risk.desc: The bell_nozzle_shell may not be robust enough for handling loads due to its display-only nature.
risk.mit: Ensure the shell is designed with sufficient thickness and reinforcement to withstand handling loads.

risk.desc: The cutaway_window might not provide adequate thermal isolation.
risk.mit: Evaluate the thermal path and consider adding insulation or redesigning the window for better isolation.

risk.desc: The bolt_circle_dummy may not be visible or accessible enough for proper inspection.
risk.mit: Ensure the dummy is clearly marked and accessible for regular inspection.

risk.desc: The engine_display_cartridge interface might not be easily removable.
risk.mit: Design the interface to allow for quick and easy removal without full teardown.

risk.desc: The combustion_chamber_dummy and turbopump_assembly_dummy may not align properly with the bell_nozzle_shell.
risk.mit: Check the alignment and fit of these dummies during assembly to ensure proper mating.

generated_parts.label: Propellant Tank Dummy (Fuel)
generated_parts.spec: Primary_structure fuel tank_dummy barrel for display only: propellant_tank_dummy, fill/drain labels, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, no fluid service

requirements: Display-only propellant tank dummy barrel for fuel
Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled
Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance
Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters)
Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only
Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge
Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming
Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
Most geometry_ops include args.at coordinates distributed across the local subsystem volume
Uses drill, pocket, boss, channel, pattern_polar, fillet, chamfer — not just boxes
Every part_tree child has 4+ dedicated geometry_ops (body+subtract+interface+finish)
Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, subtract, pocket, drill
Dimensions match small_launch_vehicle scale: 100-500mm dia, 500-2000mm length (display model). Wall thickness, hole diameters, fillet radii are physically plausible
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check

verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points (list of {at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}), thermal_zones (list of {at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}), and pressure_faces (list of {face:string, Pa:number})

cad_brief must include assembly_sequence (ordered list of {step:int, action:install|fasten|align|press|route, target:string, tool:string, torque_Nm_or_force_N:number, datum:string}) and disassembly_sequence for field-serviceable parts
For each adjacent_interface in the subsystem plan, include stack_up_mm (cumulative tolerance from assembly datum to mating face) and fit_class (e.g. H7/h6, LC2)

verify.value: all required fields present
verify.rule: all required fields must be present
mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

verify.value: all P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets

verify.value: all interfaces have reciprocal naming and DOF
verify.rule: interfaces must have reciprocal naming and DOF

verify.value: visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
verify must include a boundary_conditions object

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to insufficient alignment keys
risk.mit: Increase the number and size of alignment keys to ensure precise alignment

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under handling loads if wall thickness is too thin
risk.mit: Ensure wall thickness is within the recommended range for the chosen material and process

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress if thermal zones are not properly managed
risk.mit: Implement proper thermal management strategies and verify thermal zones

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit if clearance and fit_class are not accurately specified
risk.mit: Double-check clearance and fit_class specifications for all interfaces

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence errors if assembly sequence is not well-defined
risk.mit: Define a clear and detailed assembly sequence with step-by-step instructions

generated_parts.spec: Integration_inspection ring with assembly_datum pads, inspection_window, checklist_callout, connection type labels, load-path closure marks

requirements: inspection_window must be clear and unobstructed
assembly_datum must be precise and aligned
checklist_callout must be legible and in place
turbopump_assembly_dummy must be present and aligned
harness_path must be free of obstructions
inspection_label must be visible and correct

verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: schema
mass_est_g

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: p0_feature_mapping

verify.value: All interfaces have exact neighboring subsystem labels, connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.
verify.rule: interface_control_evidence

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: joint_evidence
analysis_ready

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming the mockup's structural integrity as a real launch vehicle component.
risk.mit: Ensure all documentation and communications clearly state the mockup is for educational and display purposes only.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence not being clearly defined, leading to misassembly.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with steps, tools, torque values, and datums.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance stack-up errors due to uncontrolled datum chain.
risk.mit: Ensure a primary datum part anchors the assembly, and each part locates off a named parent datum using a 3-2-1 scheme.

risk.desc: Risk of load path closure issues due to weak interfaces.
risk.mit: Ensure every part's primary load traces through named interfaces to the base/ground.

risk.desc: Risk of manufacturing process limitations affecting part quality.
risk.mit: Specify the manufacturing process (LPBF + CFRP layup) and ensure it aligns with the geometry and material requirements.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Assembly order evidence, inspection windows, readiness checklist hooks, connection types and load-path closure

verification_focus.requirement: inspection_window must be clear and unobstructed
assembly_datum must be precise and aligned
checklist_callout must be legible and in place
turbopump_assembly_dummy must be present and aligned
harness_path must be free of obstructions
inspection_label must be visible and correct
